laws.title: Potential Phishing Through Comments
laws.description: Links in comments might lead to phishing sites.
laws.remediation: Implement stricter filtering and warning systems for external links in comments.

laws.title: Sensitive Data Exposure in URLs
laws.description: User-specific data is occasionally embedded in URL parameters.
laws.remediation: Avoid exposing user data in URLs. Use session or token-based methods.

laws.title: Third-Party Script Security
laws.description: Numerous third-party scripts are integrated, potentially posing security risks.
laws.remediation: Regularly audit third-party scripts and apply Content Security Policies.

laws.title: Outdated Encryption Standards
laws.description: Some parts of the site use outdated cryptographic methods.
laws.remediation: Update to the latest encryption standards to ensure data security.

laws.title: Improper Handling of User Input
laws.description: There is potential risk for injection attacks due to inadequate input validation.
laws.remediation: Strengthen server-side validation and sanitize all user inputs.
